title: set_registry.tsv row schema
description: Generic registry of file 'sets' the pipeline produces or consumes — covariance matrices, sites lists, masks, recombination maps, etc. One row per file. Discriminated by `set_type`. Produced (in part) by registries/build_registries.py; downstream consumers look up by (set_type, scope, chrom) or by set_id.

set_id.description: Stable id (typically filename basename without extension). Unique across the registry.

set_type.description: What kind of file this row points at. Free-form to allow future additions. Recommended vocabulary: 'cov' (PCAngsd .cov), 'sites' (ANGSD .sites position list), 'mask' (BED of regions to include/exclude), 'recombination_map', 'ancestral_fasta', 'callable_bed', 'snp_list', 'haplotype_blocks'. Add new tokens as needed; keep them lowercase_with_underscores.

set_subtype.description: Optional finer-grained tag within a set_type. E.g. for set_type='cov', set_subtype could be 'pcangsd_default' / 'pcangsd_pruned'. For set_type='sites', could be 'all' / 'biallelic_maf05'. Empty string if not used.

scope.description: Coverage of the file. 'chromosome' = per-LG; 'global' = whole genome; 'region' = restricted to one named region/candidate.

chrom.description: Chromosome name when scope='chromosome'. 'genome' when scope='global'. The region's chromosome when scope='region'.

path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the file on disk.

description.description: Free-form note. E.g. 'PCAngsd default cov for LG28 after STEP1 v3', 'biallelic SNP sites with MAF>5% after BEAGLE imputation'.

consistency_rules.chrom_required: scope='chromosome' rows MUST have a non-empty, non-'genome' chrom value.
consistency_rules.region_scope_note: scope='region' rows SHOULD encode the region id in `set_subtype` or `description`; the chrom column carries the region's chromosome.
consistency_rules.type_subtype_pair: (set_type, set_subtype) pairs SHOULD be stable across rebuilds — change set_subtype only when the file's construction recipe changes.

examples.description: Biallelic SNPs with MAF > 0.05 after BEAGLE imputation
Callable regions: depth>=5 and MQ>=30 across all 226 samples
